issue_summary: added support for per field boost factor
javadoc_before: /** * Iterates over the given token stream and adds the resulting terms to the index; * Equivalent to adding a tokenized, indexed, termVectorStored, unstored, * Lucene {@link org.apache.lucene.document.Field}. * Finally closes the token stream. Note that untokenized keywords can be added with this method via * {@link #keywordTokenStream(Collection)}, the Lucene contrib KeywordTokenizer or similar utilities. * * @param fieldName * a name to be associated with the text * @param stream * the token stream to retrieve tokens from. */
javadoc_after: /** * Equivalent to addField(fieldName, stream, 1.0f). * * @param fieldName * a name to be associated with the text * @param stream * the token stream to retrieve tokens from */
